Cathy has first hand experience of managing career transitions, having made a number of significant career changes herself.

Cathy Balfe is an experienced and qualified careers advisor who has experience of helping hundreds of individuals with their career development. She is a Registered Career Development Professional with the Career Development Institute and is a member of the European Mentoring and Coaching Council ( EMCC ). She holds a Postgraduate Diploma from the University of Warwick in career guidance.

Career Guidance Explore Services for Adults Explore Services for Leaving Cert “The best thing about this service is that Cathy asks the right questions to help you come to conclusions yourself. Before chatting with Cathy I didn’t think I had too many career options available to me but afterwards I found that I have countless opportunities. If you are also at a cross roads or just unsure about the career options available to you then I 100% recommend Career Coach Me.

Since setting up my career coaching business I have worked with nearly 600 individuals across a wide range of industry sectors, occupations and experience levels. You can read more about my background here. Book a free enquiry call today to see if working with me will help your career development. You can explore all my career coaching services here , or choose from a category below.

I offer career guidance to clients across Ireland (with clients from Dublin, Cork, Limerick, Galway and everywhere in between. ) and the UK. I help career changers to explore career choices in a structured and guided way, taking into consideration their transferable skills and work preferences. I also help clients to write strong CVs and to interview with confidence. I also work with Leaving Certificate students making CAO decisions.
